title: Tool Trims
description: Now in beta for v3.0, with Spear trims and a better way of trimming with the vanilla Smithing Table. There are almost 2000 trim combinations!
body:
[](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/tool-trims-v1-1/) [](https://www.youtube.com/@TheJoeFly) [](https://www.reddit.com/user/TheJoeFly/) [](https://github.com/thejoefly/ToolTrims/issues) ![title_card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/52cb56c91faf1be2723e0dd78a0df6b79b6007dc.png) This data pack allows you to trim weapons and tools. There are in total 46 tools that you can trim! > ![Note](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Mqxx/GitHub-Markdown/main/blockquotes/badge/dark-theme/note.svg)
> The "Data & Resource Pack" versions have to be loaded both as a data pack and as a resource pack. Alternatively, you can just use the "For Modloaders" versions as a mod.
## Trimming a Tool To trim a tool, there are 4 new smithing templates that you can use. And, just like other templates, they can also be found on strutures and duplicated using a Crafting Table: | Smithing Template | Duplicated With | Structure | Chance (per chest) | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | ![linear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45100497b93871bb38b660063992b3e40150ccb0.png) Linear | Terracotta | Trail Ruins / Mineshaft | 7.6% / 5.6% | | ![tracks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb10c44c893f68692c28f5fdd6be78ce81a566d2.png) Tracks | Cooblestone | Pillager Outpost / Mansion | 37.5% / 50% | | ![charge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8cc30e1f22d39fc05ad12d023480b15d8a4cbb2d.png) Charge | Cobbled Deepslate | Ancient City | 5% | | ![frost](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c3f71946ff905fecbe434a83bbf45240feb497c.png) Frost | Snow Block | Igloo | 40% |
After you've found one of them, you can use it at a Smithing Table with one of the 11 ingots and crystals. Here's how the trim patterns look: ![trim_examples](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/551b068b46f0c7d48dfac0ff83a5379c794b0671.gif)
Advancements and other features ### Advancements There are also advancements you can get by trimming tools:

### For Creative Mode You can find the new smithing templates in the creative menu, they're in the same tab as the vanilla ones but they can also found by searching for "Tool Trims" or their pattern name. However, if you're on 1.21.1, you will have to use the command `/function tooltrims:get_trims` instead.

### Language Support This data pack is translated in 8 languages: - Deutsch - Español - Français - Português - Polski - Русский - Українська - 日本語
Features in versions 2.x ### Toolsmithing Table For versions 2.x of the data pack, you'll need to use a Toolsmithing table instead of the vanilla Smithing Table. It can be crafted using 2 copper ingots and 4 wood planks.


Other than trimming tools, Toolsmithing Tables are also used to duplicate the new smithing templates.



### For creative mode The new Smithing Templates and the Toolsmithing Table won't appear in the creative menu unless you enable the option "Operator Items Tab" in Controls. Alternatively, you could use the command "/function tooltrims:custom_items". It will place a chest with custom items this data pack offers, the 4 tool trim smithing templates and the Toolsmithing Table.
### Commands - **/function tooltrims:custom_items** - This command places a chest with all the tool trim smithing templates and the toolsmithing table - **/function tooltrims:load** - This command lets you reload only the Tool Trims Data Pack, it can be useful if it isn't working as expected. - **/trigger update_item** - If you used an old version of this Data Pack, this command lets you update your old trimmed tool by holding it on your main hand. (removed in v2.3.1, items update automatically after this version)
## FAQ **Can I use this data pack in my modpack/server?**
Yes, you can use it in your Modrinth modpack or server. If your server is public, you have to credit me somewhere in the server or website of the server.
**Can I make posts/videos using this data pack on social medias?**
Yes, as long as you credit me and/or include a direct link to this page. Keep in mind that you cannot redistribute modified or unmodified versions of this data pack. ## Credits **Contributors** - BlueSheep (Trimmable Tridents) **Translators** - BlueSheep (Japanese) - ESSENTIALS_GAMES (Polish) - RandomKuchen (German) - Slimy (Ukrainian and Russian) **Special Thanks** - Coolsa, for the [Gui Generator](https://coolsa.github.io/mcCustomGuiGen/) - ImpossibleEvan
## Tool Trims Alternatives These are alternative versions of Tool Trims which were specifically made for mod loaders or servers. (Thanks to [ThePotatoArchivist](https://modrinth.com/user/ThePotatoArchivist) and [SidewaysSky](https://modrinth.com/user/SidewaysSky)) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/tool-trims-mod) [](https://modrinth.com/plugin/tooltrims)
